Welcome To HighFire

Clear Solutions For Complex Process Challenges

HighFire Energy Services rapidly applies strategic solutions to resolve process disturbances across industries. We pair the right steam, heating and cleaning equipment with experienced crews who execute tactical projects start to finish.

Our work is grounded in honesty, integrity and transparency — so you always know exactly where your project stands and what comes next.

What We Offer

Our Services

A full range of steam, heating, cleaning and fabrication solutions — engineered for the demands of industrial Alberta.

Boiler Rentals

Portable, package, hot water, glycol & specialty boilers producing dry steam, with hoses, heaters & tarps included.

Fluid Heating

Efficient high-volume heating from 5M BTU hot-oiling units to 40M BTU superheater skids.

Hot Oiling

Wellsite & pipeline hot oiling across Red Earth Creek, Fox Creek, Grande Prairie & Edmonton.

Industrial Cleaning

Crude tanks, condensate bullets, rail cars, dehydration & wastewater vessel cleaning.

Specialty Steam

Up to 1000 PSIG and 250,000 lbs/hr for power generation & pulp mill outages.

Fabrication

In-house manufacturing and custom equipment builds tailored to your process.

Equipment Sales

New & used boilers and steam equipment available for purchase.

Tools & Calculators

Pipeline volume, heating time & heating power calculators for fast planning.

Rental Fleet

Steam & Heating For Every Industry

From service rigs and frac sites to mills, data centers and turnarounds — our fleet scales to the job.

  • Portable boilers — 25–100 HP, 150 PSIG, diesel-fired
  • Package boilers — 100–800 HP, gas / diesel / propane
  • Hot water & glycol boilers — 1–30M BTU/hr for freeze protection & outages
  • Specialty boilers — up to 1000 PSIG & 250,000 lbs/hr
  • Low-pressure boilers — food, beverage & commercial heating
Safety & Compliance

Safety That Exceeds The Standard

We are committed to the safety of our staff, equipment, the environment and the public. Our Health & Safety Program exceeds legislative requirements and industry standards — and our compliance is independently verified.

COR Certified ISN Registered Comply Verified

Field-ready crews dispatched across the province — with focus on the northern energy corridor.
